headline: A $1.5 Million Portfolio That Quietly Pays You $83,400 a Year, No Job Required
summary: An $83,400 annual paycheck sits comfortably above the U.S. median household income of roughly $80,610. Replacing that income with a portfolio, no employer required, is the question this article answers. The basic formula is income target divided by yield equals capital required. The more important issue is what changes across three yield tiers, and why ... A $1.5 Million Portfolio That Quietly Pays You $83,400 a Year, No Job Required
